fields.SpawnPointGenerator: A Point Generator Type component. This determines which points the spawn area will use for spawning new users.
fields.FloorPointRay: Shoots a ray from the slot containing this component and trys to detect a floor
fields.OtherUserCheckRadius: A minimum of how far away other users must be before a spawn point generated by SpawnPointGenerator is valid.
fields.ParentUser: If true, newly-spawned users will be parented to the slot holding this component.
fields.OrientUser: If true, newly-spawned users will be oriented towards the Z- axis that the slot holding this component is facing.
fields.ScaleUser: If true, newly-spawned users will be scaled to be the same scale as the slot holding this component. This can cause issues with parenting, so take care.
fields.Capacity: The maximum number of users that can be spawned in the slot holding this component at any given time. A value of -1 makes the maximum unlimited.
fields.BaseWeight: The chance this spawner will be used to spawn users. The higher the number, the more likely the chance.
fields.PositionNode: Positions the user based on this body node.
fields.RotationNode: Rotates the user based on this body node.
fields.ParentOverride: Where to place users instead of under this component's Slot.

usage: Unlike other user spawner components, the CommonSpawnArea component allows you to use a Point Generator Type component to define an arbitrary area in which users can spawn from. This gives you more granular control over a spawn area than SpawnArc.
